title: UFO hunters claim 'UK's Area 51' hides alien secrets - and is haunted too
description: Conspiracy theorists claim all the UK's findings about aliens are being kept at RAF Rudloe Manor, an old Wiltshire spy base which is heavily guarded and said to be haunted by two restless spirits

title: Chilling 'alien' message to humanity revealed in latest UFO disclosure files
description: A newly declassified FBI memo discussing messages from 'aliens' was part of the Trump administration's latest UFO disclosure release on Friday.
